scripts.test:dependency-policy: set -e; list_file=$(mktemp); audit_file=$(mktemp); trap 'rm -f "$list_file" "$audit_file"' EXIT; npx -y pnpm@10.33.0 list --prod --recursive --json --depth Infinity > "$list_file"; node scripts/security/bulk-audit.mjs "$list_file" > "$audit_file"; node scripts/security/dependency-policy.mjs --audit "$audit_file"
scripts.test:sql: pnpm run typecheck:scripts && tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 scripts/sql-harness.test.ts scripts/sql-harness.integration.test.ts scripts/sql-harness.starter-grant.test.ts scripts/sql-harness.wallet-identity.test.ts scripts/sql-harness.wallet-identity-races.test.ts scripts/sql-harness.telegram-ingress.test.ts scripts/sql-harness.telegram-ingress-recovery.test.ts scripts/sql-harness.settlement-proof-jobs.test.ts scripts/sql-harness.privacy.test.ts scripts/sql-harness.group-points.test.ts scripts/sql-harness.usdc-assets.test.ts && tsx scripts/sql-harness.ts
scripts.test:workflow: pnpm run typecheck:scripts && tsx --test scripts/check-workflow.test.ts && tsx scripts/check-workflow.ts
scripts.verify: NEXT_PUBLIC_TELEGRAM_BOT_USERNAME=calledit_test_bot NEXT_PUBLIC_TELEGRAM_STARTGROUP=calledit_v1 turbo run typecheck test build --force && pnpm run build:concierge && pnpm run verify:product-copy && pnpm run test:dependency-policy && pnpm run test:workflow && pnpm run test:sql && pnpm run test:telegram-durability && pnpm run test:local-journey && pnpm run verify:telegram-evidence
scripts.verify:telegram-evidence: pnpm run typecheck:scripts && tsx --test scripts/check-telegram-evidence.test.ts && tsx scripts/check-telegram-evidence.ts
scripts.verify:product-copy: pnpm run typecheck:product-copy && tsx --test scripts/check-product-copy.test.ts && tsx scripts/check-product-copy.ts
